items.title: Can Raducanu get back to aggressive, first-strike style on grass under coach Richardson?
items.summary: Emma Raducanu remains determined to get back to an aggressive, first-strike style on grass under returning coach Andrew Richardson.

items.title: The PL clubs changing manager... and the others that could follow
items.summary: Chelsea and Manchester United have already made big decisions over who will be in the dugout for them moving forward. Pep Guardiola has decided to leave Manchester City while there have been doubts around Liverpool boss Arne Slot this past season.

items.summary: Frank Sanchez is hoping to challenge for Oleksandr Usyk's IBF world heavyweight title 'as soon as possible', says manager Mike Borao.
